items.claim: Magomed Bibulatov is the better striker by just a smidge compared to Damian Rebesky.
items.quote: I do think he's the better striker by just a smidge and I definitely think he's the better grappler

items.claim: Wellington Turman has a record of two wins and three losses in his last five fights.
items.quote: Two and three in the last five for Turman.

items.claim: Islam Dulatov rushes in sometimes with a barrage.
items.quote: he does rush in sometimes with a barrage.

items.claim: Tyrell Fortune has a stiff one-two and is going to come forward.
items.quote: He's got a stiff one, two. He's going to come forward.

items.claim: Rizvan Kuniev has good takedown defense.
items.quote: good takedown defense, which is why I think Fortune's going to struggle with those open mat takedowns.

items.claim: Ramazan Temirov is 5-0 in his last five fights.
items.quote: Temirov is 5-0 in the last five at 19 and two looks good on that record.

items.claim: Steve Erceg has durability issues and has been really hurt in a lot of fights.
items.quote: durability though, that's the problem. We've seen him really hurt in a lot of fights and knock out in fights as well.

items.claim: Bogdan Guskov is taking the fight on about a week and a half to two weeks notice.
items.quote: Guskov's taking this fight on I you know, probably week and a half, two weeks notice.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev stays safe on the feet and doesn't do anything risky.
items.quote: stays safe on the feet, he doesn't do anything risky.
